- [ ] Preview URL
- [ ] Desktop screenshot
- [ ] Mobile screenshot
- [ ] Route and link validation
- [ ] Metadata and structured-data validation

## Safety and truth checks

- [ ] No personal birth, chart, customer, payment, secret, or token data
- [ ] Traditional models are not presented as medical or scientific proof
- [ ] School-specific and modern interpretations are labeled
- [ ] All central claims have source or review evidence
